name: unifable
description: A harness that makes Opus (or any Claude/Codex model) behave like Fable. It enforces completion, evidence, and verification as procedure, and auto-routes the right verified pack per task: render-output verification, a multi-story evidence gate, an investigation protocol, and an early-stop guard. Dual-host: Claude Code (plugin) + Codex (skill + hooks). Fork of fivetaku/fablize.
